reason: Verified via Read/Bash against disk: SRS.md correctly resolves canonical_spec=SPEC.md per PROJECT_BRIEF.md precedence (SRS.md:1-3), and transcribes all 5 FR + 6 NFR headings verbatim with DERIVED tags per R-CANONICAL-INTERP-001. No TBD/TODO/placeholder markers exist in SPEC.md so the empty Open Issues/NFR-99 section is correct, not a dropped-item omission. AC counts in the §5 summary table (6/5/5/4/7 for FR-01..05, 1/2/2/1/1/2 for NFR-01..06) match the enumerated AC lists exa
